name: Team Chabot
subject: Chabot Posts Best Off-Year Fundraising Haul in Congressional Career
body:
Today's Democrats have gone to a whole new extreme. Just when we thought they couldn't get further to the left, today's Democrats are now calling for widespread socialism, universal healthcare, the Green New Deal, slavery reparations, open borders, and even infanticide. No Images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jdtiuijk-kujkulhluu-t/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdtiuijk-kujkulhluu-r/) **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**Wednesday October 9, 2019CONTACT: Jon ConradiPHONE: ‪(513) 202-4023 **_Chabot Posts Best Off-Year Fundraising Haul in Congressional Career_** _Campaign Raises $420,000 in Third Quarter, Highest Non-Election Year Total in 13 Cycles_ CINCINNATI - Steve Chabot for Congress announced today it raised approximately $420,000 in the third quarter of 2019, including roughly $300,000 in just the month of September alone. The Q3 total marks the largest single-quarter haul for the campaign in an off-year since Congressman Chabot took office in 1995."I'm overwhelmed by the outpouring of support I've received from so many supporters who believe in common sense conservative results for Ohio," Congressman Chabot said. "With a new team and the resources needed to wage a winning effort, I'm excited to say our campaign is stronger than ever and prepared to win in 2020.""While my two opponents obsess over impeachment and embrace Elizabeth Warren's radical agenda, I remain focused on delivering results for hardworking Ohio families," Chabot continued. "Our campaign will be well-prepared to highlight that contrast for voters next fall.""I'm incredibly grateful for all the hardworking Ohio families who have invested in our effort and look forward to continuing to serve our community in Washington," Chabot added.The $420,000 Q3 2019 fundraising total is the highest non-election year quarterly total for Chabot's campaign in the 13 cycles since he was first sworn into office. ### | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdtiuijk-kujkulhluu-y/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdtiuijk-kujkulhluu-j/)
---|---
6613 Glenway Ave, Cincinnati, OH 45211

name: Team Fair Fight
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
We're not kidding when we say that our movement for voting rights is people-powered, friend. |

[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa56d/34a064cc/18dd66ae/7030a34/163503807/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Friend - Last week, we closed the books on another fundraising quarter at Fair Fight. And while our work is far from done, we want to say thank you. Our team not only reached our ambitious fundraising goal -- we surpassed it. And more importantly, we shattered our previous small-dollar donor record. We're not kidding when we say that our movement for voting rights is people-powered. Because you see the power and potential of the movement we're building together, you are helping us lead our fight for free and fair elections to victory. For that, we're truly grateful. **[For too long, time-tested voter suppression tactics have burdened the right to vote, and dismantling the work of voter suppression will require major resources. Can you chip in to help us keep this momentum going?](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa56d/34a064cc/18dd66ae/7030a35/163503807/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2019?refcode=IE100919TY")** This battle won't be won overnight, but together we can build a stronger Georgia and a brighter America for all of our communities. With gratitude,
Team Fair Fight

body:
Our campaign is gaining some serious momentum
Friends, our campaign is gaining some _serious_ momentum:
[](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164640/1e3760f0/691593e3/5f7eeef1/3277429626/VEsH/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1910-q4-wc?refcode=191009-email")
That's why we're reaching out. We want to continue this trend and keep growing to take our grassroots, people-powered campaign to new heights.
[**Can you help us get 100 donations today to build on this amazing news by chipping in $5 or $10?**](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164640/1e3760f0/691593e3/5f7eeeee/3277429626/VEsE/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1910-q4-wc?refcode=191009-email&recurring=auto")
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164640/1e3760f0/691593e3/5f7eeef1/3277429626/VEsF/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1910-q4-wc?refcode=191009-email")
**You see, there 's no doubt our Republican opponent, Steve Daines, and his ally Mitch McConnell are reading the same headlines we are. We're sure they're planning attacks on Wilmot as we type this out.**
You better believe mountains of special interest and dark money will flood Montana, piling high to try to stop Wilmot from making it to the Senate.

So, what do you say, friend? Will you chip in whatever you can to help us win this crucial U.S. Senate seat?

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Impeachment and the Economy
body:
Remember "it's the economy, stupid?" No Images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jdtiuujd-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdtiuujd-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdtiuujd-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Impeachment and the Economy](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdtiuujd-kujkulhluu-j/)
Back in 1992, Bill Clinton's campaign manager, James Carville, successfully used the slogan "it's the economy, stupid" to defeat George H.W. Bush for the presidency. So how is the economy looking this election cycle, and what impact will that have on President Trump's bid for winning a second term? [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdtiuujd-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdtiuujd-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Will Impeachment Sink a Critical Trade Deal?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdtiuujd-kujkulhluu-d/)
The Democrats are creating a political firestorm with their false impeachment inquiry against President Trump. Meanwhile, important issues are being ignored. In this week's blog, I discuss these issues that have more effect on our lives than this latest attempt to remove the President from office. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdtiuujd-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdtiuujd-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [A Very Dangerous Situation](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdtiuujd-kujkulhluu-u/)
The recent Iranian missile attack on Saudi Arabia's largest oil facility is a major escalation in danger on the world scene. President Trump's critics, stretching back to before the 2016 election, claimed when such an event occurs, Trump would be rash and irresponsible. In this week's blog, I write how I think the President is handling this latest act of aggression. Were his critics right? [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdtiuujd-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdtiuujd-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [The Fake Impeachment](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdtiuujd-kujkulhluu-n/)
The Democrat base hates President Trump, and to satisfy their unruly base, the Dems are putting on an act, **a fake impeachment!** Read my blog this week and I'll explain this latest desperate attempt to stop the President. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdtiuujd-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdtiuujd-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdtiuujd-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdtiuujd-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdtiuujd-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdtiuujd-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdtiuujd-kujkulhluu-f/)

name: Team Walz-Flanagan
subject: Fwd: What we can expect on Thursday.
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
| Hi, We wanted to make sure you saw this urgent message from Governor Walz. President Trump is coming to Minnesota tonight to hold a rally and we cannot allow his divisive message to win the day. Our campaign has a responsibility to prove that Minnesotans are ready to reject the politics of fear and division in 2020 in favor of unity -- just like we did in 2018. This is an unbelievably critical moment for our state, and we still need about 200 individual contributions to hit our goal. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/hSVPZRbutxLqIpgC6JC2FMxqgCFZLNdcIX10pV7GS4A=/XD1xSpa0QrhYUFzP8_ssFrj3kIIJv3cUNpjyhgXEIcY=?refcode=header&amount=25)
---
Hi,
We wanted to make sure you saw this urgent message from Governor Walz. President Trump is coming to Minnesota tonight to hold a rally and we cannot allow his divisive message to win the day.
**Our campaign has a responsibility to prove that Minnesotans are ready to reject the politics of fear and division in 2020 in favor of unity -- just like we did in 2018.** This is an unbelievably critical moment for our state, and we still need about 200 individual contributions to hit our goal.
[**We 're counting on your support. Please make a donation of any amount that works for you right away to help us get there. Even $1 helps!!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/hSVPZRbutxLqIpgC6JC2FMxqgCFZLNdcIX10pV7GS4A=/XD1xSpa0QrhYUFzP8_ssFrj3kIIJv3cUNpjyhgXEIcY=?refcode=body&amount=25)
Thank you,
Team Walz-Flanagan
\-------- Forwarded message --------
From: Tim Walz
My friend,
This Thursday, President Trump will be holding a campaign rally in Minnesota for the second time this year.
Now, I can't predict the future, but if it's anything like his past campaign rallies (or his Twitter feed), we can expect a message of fear and negativity.
We won with historic margins in 2018 because we ran on a positive platform that recognizes our strength in unity. I, for one, can't wait to show once again that Minnesotans stand ready to reject the politics of division in 2020. But I can't do it alone. It will take all of us working together to elect allies up and down the ballot who are ready to join us in the fight for a brighter vision for our state. And that work has to start right now.
**To prove that our people-powered campaign for One Minnesota is united and stronger than ever, we must hit our 500 individual donor goal by Thursday night.**
[**Please, make a contribution that works for you today to help us get there. Even $1 gets us one step closer. I 'm counting on your support.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/hSVPZRbutxLqIpgC6JC2FMxqgCFZLNdcIX10pV7GS4A=/XD1xSpa0QrhYUFzP8_ssFrj3kIIJv3cUNpjyhgXEIcY=?refcode=body&amount=25)
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

****[Express Donate: $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/hSVPZRbutxLqIpgC6JC2FMxqgCFZLNdcIX10pV7GS4A=/XD1xSpa0QrhYUFzP8_ssFrj3kIIJv3cUNpjyhgXEIcY=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=_50-p)****
****[Express Donate: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/hSVPZRbutxLqIpgC6JC2FMxqgCFZLNdcIX10pV7GS4A=/XD1xSpa0QrhYUFzP8_ssFrj3kIIJv3cUNpjyhgXEIcY=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=_100-p)****
****[Express Donate: $250](https://act.myngp.com/el/hSVPZRbutxLqIpgC6JC2FMxqgCFZLNdcIX10pV7GS4A=/XD1xSpa0QrhYUFzP8_ssFrj3kIIJv3cUNpjyhgXEIcY=?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=_250-p)****
****[Or, donate another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/hSVPZRbutxLqIpgC6JC2FMxqgCFZLNdcIX10pV7GS4A=/XD1xSpa0QrhYUFzP8_ssFrj3kIIJv3cUNpjyhgXEIcY=?refcode=_other-p)****
Thank you for all that you do for this campaign.

Tim Walz

name: Jeff Larivee
subject: this depends on us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
body:
Hey, wanted to check in with you about what the team and I have been talking about.

Since the impeachment inquiries started, it seems that folks have started focusing in on the executive branch, and donations to House candidates has slowed.

Make no mistake - holding Trump accountable depends wholly on holding the House. That’s why Zoe is so concerned with these numbers, and why she asked me to reach out.

We need another $2,115 in the door by midnight to stay on track for this month. Can you chip in?

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lvf-oct19?refcode=LVF_EM_FR_WL_191008_1_1&amount=35&recurring=auto [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lvf-oct19?refcode=LVF_EM_FR_WL_191008_1_1&amount=35&recurring=auto]

Thanks,

Jeff

Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is a strong fighter for California’s values in Washington. As the Chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation she has been on the front lines of expanding and protecting the Democratic Majority. Zoe has dedicated her career to fighting for our diverse communities and needs your help. Click here to donate to Zoe’s campaign → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zlem?refcode=emfooter&amount=10&recurring=auto]
Contributions or gifts to Zoe Lofgren for Congress are not tax deductible.Paid for by Lofgren for Congress

subject: abortion case coming to the Supreme Court (Kavanaugh)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there -- the Supreme Court just announced that it will hear the first big abortion case since Kavanaugh joined the bench.
**Vox is saying that the case,_June Medical Services v. Gee_ , could "well be the vehicle the Court's conservatives use to gut the right to an abortion."**
Reelecting Senator Hassan is critical to stopping Republicans from picking up more "yes" votes for Trump's next ultra-conservative, anti-choice Supreme Court nominee. We're terrified that the Court is hearing a case that could undo _Roe_ , so we have to ask:

name: Greg Stanton
subject: [SIGN ON] stop wasting government resources on the inefficient Border Wall
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
**There is no question -- we must always work diligently and in a bi-partisan way to keep our borders secure.**

But -- this President's irresponsible forced misuse of vital national defense and education funds to build a wall that will do nothing to make us more safe is not the answer.

[**Add your name to demand the Trump Administration cease using our tax dollars appropriated for schools and the military to build the Border Wall -- SIGN ON »**](https://act.myngp.com/el/toRH4fG9EiNa3jx8z9C_krohZsIZxbL_ZUM6J4rFWcM=/nyfPiYmZhoh5OElqJyDG8it680ranj849KpC26cFPm4=)

We've made it very clear -- taking funding away from vital national defense programs and bases to build this wall is not responsible and could directly harm Arizona's economy.

[**Will you sign on to this petition calling on the Administration to stop wasting government resources on this inefficient project?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/toRH4fG9EiNa3jx8z9C_krohZsIZxbL_ZUM6J4rFWcM=/nyfPiYmZhoh5OElqJyDG8it680ranj849KpC26cFPm4=)

name: Bill Olson
subject: We need to stop the Democrats in Florida
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gY9XcT9C2V6OuRU&b=kemhoGA.VuSQU0ExfE7sdg

Hi Peter

Darren Soto is a career politician.

He is one of Nancy Pelosi's lap dogs - he loyally obeys her, instead of representing his constituents.

And now, he's all-in on impeaching the President. Not because the President committed any crime, but because Soto disagrees with the President politically.

THAT HAS TO CHANGE!

My name is Bill Olson. I’m not a career politician. I don’t have a law degree.

I earned my education in the Cold War frontiers of Germany and South Korea, as well as the battlefields of Kuwait, Iraq, and Afghanistan. Seeing that death and destruction – and the chaos and turmoil it brought America – was moving and saddening.

I’m running to fight for American greatness, American peace, and American pride.

I am a Christian conservative. My guide stones?

The Declaration of Independence, the Constitution, and the Holy Bible.

Those texts remind us of where we came from. They detail the tyranny we faced, and overcame.

And right now, we need that wisdom to guide us - because Congress is WAY off track!

Impeachment is not supposed to be a method of resolving our political disputes. It's supposed to be a rare way to remove a President who has committed high crimes.

President Trump is innocent! And he is a great President and a great American. He does not deserve to be removed!

He deserves to be re-elected!

Perhaps you agree with me, that we need more Bible, more Constitution- and less crazy liberal Democrats like Darren Soto.

If so, then I need your help!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gY9XcT9C2V6OuRU&b=kemhoGA.VuSQU0ExfE7sdg

Darren Soto will have all of Nancy Pelosi's Swamp money. That's why I need your help today- to replace Darren Soto, and stop impeachment!

Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gY9XcT9C2V6OuRU&b=kemhoGA.VuSQU0ExfE7sdg

I need to raise $23,500 before the end of this month

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gY9XcT9C2V6OuRU&b=kemhoGA.VuSQU0ExfE7sdg
to let the people of Central Florida know about Soto's liberal record.

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gY9XcT9C2V6OuRU&b=kemhoGA.VuSQU0ExfE7sdg
of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1000.... all the way to the Federal maximum donation of $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple?

The Democrats are going to lose next year- but only if we let the American people know what they have done. It's up to us!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gY9XcT9C2V6OuRU&b=kemhoGA.VuSQU0ExfE7sdg

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gY9XcT9C2V6OuRU&b=kemhoGA.VuSQU0ExfE7sdg

P.S. This is congressional seat we can win in the swing state of Florida. I must defeat this radical socialist Democrat. Please contribute now before the end of the month whatever you can afford.

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gY9XcT9C2V6OuRU&b=kemhoGA.VuSQU0ExfE7sdg
No amount is too small. God bless you and thank you - Bill.

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

Bill Olson is a retired member of the United States Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

5 Halifax Ct
Marlton NJ 08053
USA

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: Is your vote being nullified?
body:
| | Hi Peter, I hope you’ve been able to keep your sanity amidst the impeachment idiocy. Politicians in Washington pursuing impeachment are trying to nullify the votes of those who voted for President Trump. And the mainstream media are working overtime to do all they can to aid politicians’ agenda of overturning the election results. It’s clear - what we are witnessing isn’t about evidence and facts. We know this because the cries for impeachment aren’t new. They date back to President Trump’s first month in office by the supposedly fair, objective, and unbiased journalists in our media. Politicians on both sides of the aisle are disregarding the people’s votes and grasping for political power. This is the rawest and most savage form of politics, my friend. But this isn’t just a game; there is a real danger should their scheme succeed. If it becomes normal, following a presidential election, that the losing side refuses to accept the results and uses every tactic possible to void the voter’s choice, then we will have destroyed fair and free elections which are the bedrock of our system of government. If it weren’t for you, I would be very worried about the path in which our country is headed. You see, I believe you understand what’s happening, and you’re the kind of person who takes action. **At My Faith Votes, we’re working tirelessly to ensure 90-million bible-believing Christians are heard loud and clear at the ballot box in 2020 - but our strategy won’t work without you.** There are an estimated 25 million registered Christians who don’t vote in presidential elections, which means 25 million opportunities to protect unborn life, gender as male and female, and our free exercise of religion in the public square are WASTED. **When Christians fail to vote, it’s just as good as voting for the other side.** **[We need your financial support to help us reach and activate millions of Christians. Your donation will help implement our proven strategy to equip them to vote](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p191009apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191010apl01nda&n=1).** We’ve got to outwork, outspend, outsmart and out-pray the other side. With your contribution, we can awaken millions of Christians to fight back against secular ideologies and political schemes that threaten our republic. If I can count on you, please click the button below to make your best gift today. When you and other Christians like you across the nation donate, I have no doubt that we will be an unstoppable force. And the schemes to divide and undermine our country and our values won’t stand a chance. [](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p191009apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191010apl01nda&n=2) **United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191010apl01nda&n=3)
---
* * *
©2019 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191010apl01nda&n=4).
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191010apl01nda&n=5) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191010apl01nda&n=6) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191010apl01nda&n=7)

name: Tony Evers
subject: We can defeat the most unpopular governor in the country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
When I got into the race for governor, nobody thought a lifelong educator could win in one of the most competitive governor's races in the country.
|
---

| | Peter --

When I got into the race for governor, nobody thought a lifelong educator could win in one of the most competitive governor's races in the country.

With your help, we beat the odds and proved everyone wrong. That's why I am coming to you once again. Let's help my friend, Andy Beshear, in Kentucky and defeat their GOP governor, Matt Bevin, who's bullied and demeaned teachers and working families for too long.

_Democrat Andy Beshear is leading according to the latest polls, but Bevin and his allies are spending big to try and defeat him -- that is why he needs our help._

**[Can you click here and rush a donation of $5 or more to Andy's campaign for governor?](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a0e/ad6dc73/14701547/db7d5ab/3995899648/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMyMSJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ab-donate?refcode=20191010.1nd__321__&amount=5")**

According to the _Washington Post_ , his race is the MOST likely race to flip from red to blue in 2019. Polling shows Andy in the lead, but if we want to make sure he wins, **he needs our support now.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[DONATE $5](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a0e/ad6dc73/14701547/db7d5a8/3995899648/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMyMSJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ab-donate?express_lane=true&refcode=20191010.1nd__321__&amount=5")** **[DONATE $10](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a0e/ad6dc73/14701547/db7d5a9/3995899648/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMyMSJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ab-donate?express_lane=true&refcode=20191010.1nd__321__&amount=10")** **[DONATE $25](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a0e/ad6dc73/14701547/db7d5ae/3995899648/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMyMSJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ab-donate?express_lane=true&refcode=20191010.1nd__321__&amount=25")** **[DONATE $50](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a0e/ad6dc73/14701547/db7d5af/3995899648/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMyMSJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ab-donate?express_lane=true&refcode=20191010.1nd__321__&amount=50")** **[DONATE $100](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a0e/ad6dc73/14701547/db7d5ac/3995899648/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMyMSJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ab-donate?express_lane=true&refcode=20191010.1nd__321__&amount=100")** **[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a0e/ad6dc73/14701547/db7d5ad/3995899648/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMyMSJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ab-donate?refcode=20191010.1nd__321__")** As Attorney General, Andy has led the charge to protect teachers from Bevin's attacks.

Andy believes so much in public education that he named a teacher, Jacqueline Coleman, as his running mate. I am proud to support their ticket but we need to make sure they've got the resources it takes to win.

**Andy can 't win alone, that is why I am asking for your help. [Can you click here and donate $5 or more directly to his campaign and help defeat Matt Bevin?](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a0e/ad6dc73/14701547/db7d5ab/3995899648/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMyMSJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ab-donate?refcode=20191010.1nd__321__&amount=5")**

Thanks for all you do,

Tony

With your help, we beat the odds and proved everyone wrong. That's why I am coming to you once again. Let's help my friend, Andy Beshear, in Kentucky and defeat their GOP governor, Matt Bevin, who's bullied and demeaned teachers and working families for too long. Democrat Andy Beshear is leading according to the latest polls, but Bevin and his allies are spending big to try and defeat him -- that is why he needs our help. "" According to the Washington Post , his race is the MOST likely race to flip from red to blue in 2019. Polling shows Andy in the lead, but if we want to make sure he wins, he needs our support now. name: Amy Mesner, SaraGideon.com
subject: "Collins is now locked in the most competitive race she's had since she won this seat"
body:
Cook Political Report says...
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c87/4bef7a87/6b4fad0d/287f2d8a/2544190510/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

**" Collins is now locked in the most competitive race she's had since she won this seat in 1996."
_\- Cook Political Report_**
Friend,
Susan Collins hasn't had a really tough challenge since she was first elected to the Senate over two decades ago..._until now._
That's why _Cook Political Report_ ranked our race a "toss-up", and the _Washington Post_ lists Maine as one of the Senate seats "most likely to flip."
All of that sounds like good news - but there's a catch:
Mitch McConnell and national Republican donors are reading the same headlines. They know they have to keep Collins' Senate seat in order to maintain their Senate majority - so they're getting ready to spend _millions_ of dollars to help her win.
I'll be honest, it's going to be hard to keep pace - especially since our campaign isn't taking any money from corporate PACs. But I know I can count on this grassroots team to have our backs - and that's why I ask:
[****Contribute $3 right away to support our campaign. We have momentum on our side, but if we can 't keep pace with Republican spending, Sara's message will be drowned out. ****](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c87/4bef7a87/6b4fad0d/287f2d89/2544190510/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMTAtYSJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october?refcode=em191010-a")
Control of the Senate is at stake. Neither side can afford to lose this seat. We have to come through.
All my best,
\- Amy Mesner
Campaign Manager
******[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c87/4bef7a87/6b4fad0d/287f2d89/2544190510/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMTAtYSJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october?refcode=em191010-a")******

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c87/4bef7a87/6b4fad0d/287f2d88/2544190510/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c87/4bef7a87/6b4fad0d/287f2d8f/2544190510/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: Mark Warner
subject: Virginia is at a crossroads
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
With Election Day on November 5th, we've got a lot of work to do and not much time left. Will you split a donation between my re-election campaign and the Democratic Party of Virginia (DPVA)?
|
---
| | **Step 1: Flip the General Assembly
Step 2: Defend our progress** | ****[DONATE NOW](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d074/53d9897e/52733d4d/1c8eee70/3268132628/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI3MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-dpvasplit?refcode=20191010nd__273__&refcode2=cont1&amount=5")****
---
Derek, in only a couple of weeks, Virginia will arrive at a crossroads.

We'll have to decide if we're going to allow the Republican-controlled General Assembly to continue **stonewalling progress** or if we're going to elect **a Democratic majority that will push our Commonwealth forward in 2019 and 2020.**

For me, the choice is crystal clear. That's why I've spent so much time on the road lately, campaigning for local Democratic candidates all across Virginia. But even if we win big next month, we'll still have to dig in and defend our hard-earned gains in 2020.

With Election Day on November 5th, we've got a lot of work to do and not much time left. **Will you split a donation between my re-election campaign and the Democratic Party of Virginia (DPVA)?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[DONATE $5](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d074/53d9897e/52733d4d/1c8eee7f/3268132628/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI3MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-dpvasplit?express_lane=true&refcode=20191010nd__273__&refcode2=express_lane_1&amount=5")**
**[DONATE $10](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d074/53d9897e/52733d4d/1c8eee7e/3268132628/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI3MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-dpvasplit?express_lane=true&refcode=20191010nd__273__&refcode2=express_lane_2&amount=10")**
**[DONATE $25](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d074/53d9897e/52733d4d/1c8eee7d/3268132628/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI3MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-dpvasplit?express_lane=true&refcode=20191010nd__273__&refcode2=express_lane_3&amount=25")**
**[DONATE $50](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d074/53d9897e/52733d4d/1c8eee7c/3268132628/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI3MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-dpvasplit?express_lane=true&refcode=20191010nd__273__&refcode2=express_lane_4&amount=50")**
**[DONATE $100](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d074/53d9897e/52733d4d/1c8eee7b/3268132628/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI3MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-dpvasplit?express_lane=true&refcode=20191010nd__273__&refcode2=express_lane_5&amount=100")**
**[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d074/53d9897e/52733d4d/1c8eee7a/3268132628/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI3MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-dpvasplit?refcode=20191010nd__273__&refcode2=express_lane_other")**
Here's what we need to do if we want to see progress in Virginia:
* **Step 1:** Retake the House of Delegates and Virginia Senate on November 5th. We can do this by knocking on as many doors as possible and talking to as many Virginians as possible.
* **Step 2:** Protect our progress by keeping Virginia blue and making sure I'm able to continue fighting for all of you in the Senate.

None of this is possible without the help of folks like **_you._** Your help is absolutely **_essential_** to winning big in November and defending our wins in 2020.

There's not a moment to lose. **[Will you split a contribution between the DPVA and my campaign?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d074/53d9897e/52733d4d/1c8eee79/3268132628/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI3MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-dpvasplit?refcode=20191010nd__273__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**

Thanks,
Mark

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d074/53d9897e/52733d4d/1c8eee78/3268132628/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI3MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-dpvasplit?refcode=20191010nd__273__&refcode2=cont2&amount=5")****

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Lindsey Graham's Senate seat is winnable!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, South Carolina Senator Lindsey Graham, former Trump critic and current Trump sycophant, has been doing everything he can to cozy up to the White House \-- and it may cost him his re-election. Democratic challenger Jaime Harrison raised a whopping $2.6 million in the third quarter, breaking his own Q2 record for the most a Democratic South Carolina U.S. Senate candidate has raised. Graham called the entire whistleblower complaint "hearsay," labeling it a setup on "Face the Nation." He said that Trump's call with the Ukrainian president was "very appropriate" and that it was completely ethical for Trump to pressure a foreign country to dig up dirt for him. He's even defending Trump's trade war with China as his own constituents face layoffs and a slow economy as a result. His actions are having a tremendous impact on his re-election chances. Since June, Democratic challenger Jaime Harrison has cut the polling gap in half and is now only seven points down with 13 months left until Election Day. We're asking voters what they think about this race, and we need 139 more responses by MIDNIGHT: **Do you approve of Lindsey Graham?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddf4/6e9863e8/157416cc/1db0fd34/3684778341/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/GtLcRiNr") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddf4/6e9863e8/157416cc/1db0fd34/3684778341/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/GtLcRiNr") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddf4/6e9863e8/157416cc/1db0fd3a/3684778341/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-jaime-nd?refcode=WDTO20191010a.ND-b&refcode2=npd5VkM4ygIqNJtAIc6m")

name: Andrew Yang
subject: Here’s what the political establishment told me about change:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=1472%2E377263%2EHjSh3E) Yang Gang --

There’s a story I talk about often at rallies and town halls that I would like to share with you now.

When I was helping young entrepreneurs start businesses in cities across America, I saw the devastation that was happening in local communities because of automation and our changing economy.

So I headed to DC and asked our elected representatives what they were planning to do to solve the problem. **Their solutions ranged from ineffective to nonexistent.**

So I did the math and came up with the real solutions that would address these issues. When I went back to talk with our representatives again, I was told something I’ll never forget: _"You are in the wrong town, here in Washington. We are not a town of leaders, we are a town of followers. What you need to do, Andrew, is to create a wave across this country and bring it crashing down on our heads.”_ After that, I said, “Challenge accepted.” Many in the establishment and the media laughed at us in the beginning, but I can guarantee you they’re not laughing now.

**Every day, in town halls, online, and in local communities with friends talking to friends, we’re building this wave together. A wave we can bring crashing down on Washington to build the change we need.**

So here’s where we stand at this moment: the wave is building. We are qualifying for every debate. We are meeting every challenge the DNC throws at us. We are growing in the polls We are easily breaking through the donor thresholds. We are shocking the establishment with our grassroots fundraising totals. This is what we’ve all done together, Yang Gang.

Now is not the time to slow down -- we need to accelerate. We must hire exponentially more staff, travel to more states, and yes, raise more money to match the top contenders in this race.

**[Can you chip in for the first time and be a part of this moment? We cannot bring the wave crashing down on Washington without you.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/13073?t=5&akid=1472%2E377263%2EHjSh3E)**

As much as many in the establishment media have tried to label me the candidate of “doom-and-gloom,” I only ran for president because I believe we can build a better world, for ourselves and our children. We can build a world that doesn’t leave anyone behind. Together, we can do anything.

-Andrew | **We can end poverty, provide healthcare to all, and remake the economy -- but we have to do it together. Can you chip in to build this movement and make history?** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/13073?t=6&akid=1472%2E377263%2EHjSh3E)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=1472%2E377263%2EHjSh3E) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=1472%2E377263%2EHjSh3E) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---
© 2019 Friends of Andrew Yang
All Rights Reserved
New York, NY
[Privacy Policy](https://www.yang2020.com/privacy-policy?t=4&akid=1472%2E377263%2EHjSh3E)

name: Alex Sestak
subject: From Alex Sestak
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
When I was young, I most loved drawing. So when my Dad decided to run for public office after my brain cancer, I drew him the poster below - [**_Joe Sestak is walking in your shoes_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10737695/108387597/-455415357?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTVkOTU2ZS05NWViLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c29fGd3psHMBAzt5VkKFMz0GqCiaKlkBIzYSPbBvR1s=&refcode=alexemail1).
Now years later, he’ll start his [**_walk across New Hampshire_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10737696/108387598/-455415357?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTVkOTU2ZS05NWViLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c29fGd3psHMBAzt5VkKFMz0GqCiaKlkBIzYSPbBvR1s=&refcode=alexemail1) this coming Sunday because he hasn’t changed: meeting and talking with everyone on an individual basis, learning about them to better serve them.
Whether it was in the Navy or in Congress, my Dad was always the same: taking the time to listen to people to see what bothered them, and tell them what he would do.
[**Could you help my Dad financially to get the word out on what he most wants to do: serve people and bring together a divided America.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10737697/108387599/-455415357?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTVkOTU2ZS05NWViLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c29fGd3psHMBAzt5VkKFMz0GqCiaKlkBIzYSPbBvR1s=&refcode=alexemail1) And he can do it. Thank you, so much.
Sincerely,
Alex Sestak

[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10737698/108387600/-455415357?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTVkOTU2ZS05NWViLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c29fGd3psHMBAzt5VkKFMz0GqCiaKlkBIzYSPbBvR1s=&refcode=alexemail1)
Come on board. We encourage you to [visit our website](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10737699/108387601/-209557350?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTVkOTU2ZS05NWViLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c29fGd3psHMBAzt5VkKFMz0GqCiaKlkBIzYSPbBvR1s=&emci=b49fc4c8-67eb-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=f55d956e-95eb-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798)
and get involved in these challenging and wonderful times.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump Keeps Promise to Tame Bureaucracy that Runs Roughshod Over Americans
body:
"When President Trump took office in 2017, he promised the American people that he would clean up Washington’s regulatory overreach." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=79718ff278&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **President Trump Keeps Promise to Tame Bureaucracy that Runs Roughshod Over Americans**

“When President Trump took office in 2017, he promised the American people that he would clean up Washington’s regulatory overreach. He pledged to make government accountable to the people. And he has made good on his promises by driving the largest deregulation effort since President Reagan took office over 30 years ago,” Acting White House Management and Budget Director Russ Vought writes for Fox News.

Yesterday, the President took another important action: He signed two executive orders that will protect “Americans against secret or unlawful bureaucratic interpretations of rules and guards against unfair or unexpected penalties for non-compliance.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e67cbeca2f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “How are middle-income Americans doing two and a half years after President Trump took office? Better than ever,” Grover Norquist writes in [Fox Business](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e354cc880f&e=3ee4985eea). Real median income is up $4,114 since President Trump took office. “From the first day of George W. Bush’s administration to the last day of Obama’s the median income increased about $1,000.”
---
|
---
| While the far-left media keeps hoping for a recession, “the hard data, which refers to actual numbers about the economy such as unemployment and retail sales, continues to reflect economic strength,” Fred Imbert reports for [CNBC](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fd2187c767&e=3ee4985eea). “The U.S. unemployment rate fell to a 50-year low in September while retail sales grew more than expected in August.”
---
|
---
| “The day after the 2016 presidential election, the Democrats began talking about impeachment. They haven’t let up since. The fact that they stated their intent to pursue impeachment before Trump was even in office reveals that they are motivated by hatred,” Rep. Andy Biggs (R-AZ) writes in [_The Daily Signal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=76237b9783&e=3ee4985eea) _._
---
|
---
| “Ivanka Trump, daughter of President Donald Trump and advisor to the president, will be visiting Kansas City along with U.S. Health and Human Services Secretary Alex Azar, for a child care roundtable” today, [**KMBC 9 News**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cc09b0f3a3&e=3ee4985eea) reports. “Part of the goal is to discuss improving access to child care for working families.” ____
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ba83809585&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fb562e07c9&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=1b5e6f7bf3)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

Andy Biggs (R-AZ) writes in . | | “Ivanka Trump, daughter of President Donald Trump and advisor to the president, will be visiting Kansas City along with U.S. Health and Human Services Secretary Alex Azar, for a child care roundtable” today, reports. “Part of the goal is to discuss improving access to child care for working families.” ____ | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

Passing common sense gun reform _is_ common sense. Plain and simple. [**Add your name now if you agree.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10739880/108406394/601243309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDM1MWY4Ni05YWViLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P359gapJCgCQD1CWKxmkc0l-4sBmwmGNuKgXXir2xyc=&emci=543f79d6-99eb-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=74351f86-9aeb-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=2478574)

Peter, we’ve suffered enough tragedy. Now is the time to come together and demand action. We must demand that our elected officials keep our communities and our neighborhoods safe.

**Are you with me? Add your name here:**

[**https://www.paction.us/congressgun/lipinski-for-congress**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10739898/108406418/601243309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDM1MWY4Ni05YWViLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P359gapJCgCQD1CWKxmkc0l-4sBmwmGNuKgXXir2xyc=&emci=543f79d6-99eb-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=74351f86-9aeb-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=2478574)

| Friend,
With an unemployment rate of 3.3%, Montana has jobs available. However, you deserve a fair value for the work done. In Congress, I will fight to provide hard working Montanans with security and wages that grow with their experience. Whether you're a rancher, farmer, police officer, mechanic, truck driver, boutique owner, teacher, and so many more across the state - you deserve to have your voice heard and represented. Salaried, union, or dependent on the markets when you sell your wheat or calves - you deserve to have your voice heard and represented. Big town or small rural town - you deserve to have your voice heard and represented. [Montana is incredibly fortunate to have such a candidate. Can you chip in to make sure Matt wins?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10740451/108408736/-971702669?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjAzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWU4ZmJiNS05ZmViLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wLLJI-F3mp09-RCfxQPWGF5BJPLoMgO6hWXJA6PUVeM=&refcode=BLU-RAIN-20190928-1-EM&recurring=true&amount=25)
| | | [SUPPORT THE CAMPAIGN ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10740452/108408737/-2066235391?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjAzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWU4ZmJiNS05ZmViLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wLLJI-F3mp09-RCfxQPWGF5BJPLoMgO6hWXJA6PUVeM=)
---

When industries like Agriculture falter due to markets, mother nature, or forces bigger than the farm, Montana falters. Our small towns falter. The effects are felt in all industries across the state. This cowboy knows that when our Agriculture sector thrives, we all prosper. As a rancher myself, I have "skin in the game". I will not let down the four generations of my family's ranchers and farmers that I now follow in their footsteps.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10740453/108408738/-971702669?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjAzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWU4ZmJiNS05ZmViLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wLLJI-F3mp09-RCfxQPWGF5BJPLoMgO6hWXJA6PUVeM=&refcode=BLU-RAIN-20190928-1-EM&recurring=true&amount=25) _The Birdtail Broodmares_
It's time we put a true Montanan in Congress to speak for all of us. A Montana public school system student. A West Point veteran. A horse trainer. A legacy rancher. We need to trust those that serve us in Congress to have our backs. Montanans can trust one of our own. A Leader is a servant and I truly hope to be able to serve all Montanans as your Representative.

[Please help us get this Montanan into Congress! We need a grounded and dedicated voice fighting for what makes Montana so special!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10740454/108408739/-2066235391?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjAzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWU4ZmJiNS05ZmViLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wLLJI-F3mp09-RCfxQPWGF5BJPLoMgO6hWXJA6PUVeM=)

name: Peggy Flanagan
subject: These two strong native women give me hope
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
| My friend, With President Trump on his way to Minnesota to spread his divisive message tonight, the timing couldn't have been more perfect for a visit from Deb Haaland and Sharice Davids, two strong Native women who were elected to Congress in 2018. As easy as it is to become discouraged by the state of our national politics, these two strong Native women give me hope. I was proud to stand with my sisters today. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/elIoYIZLB8CQkVHmIWerMjKYfx1VL4Fzf-6YisCtgds=/C3_WDx5sNhe4iO6zOBIPoNBi7gXI7Wz7I9z0AswGgCo=?refcode=header&amount=25)
---
My friend,
With President Trump on his way to Minnesota to spread his divisive message tonight, the timing couldn't have been more perfect for a visit from Deb Haaland and Sharice Davids, two strong Native women who were elected to Congress in 2018.
As easy as it is to become discouraged by the state of our national politics, these two strong Native women give me hope. I was proud to stand with my sisters today.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/elIoYIZLB8CQkVHmIWerMjKYfx1VL4Fzf-6YisCtgds=/C3_WDx5sNhe4iO6zOBIPoNBi7gXI7Wz7I9z0AswGgCo=?refcode=image&amount=25)
Native women and women of color have been leaders since time immemorial, we've always been powerful, and we stand ready to prove it once again in 2020.
So, ahead of Trump's campaign rally in Minnesota tonight, I'm asking you to join me in sending an unmistakable message:
**Help us hit our 500 individual donor goal before midnight and prove that our One Minnesota movement is stronger than ever. [We're still about 230 short and we could use your support. Anything helps -- even $1!](https://act.myngp.com/el/elIoYIZLB8CQkVHmIWerMjKYfx1VL4Fzf-6YisCtgds=/C3_WDx5sNhe4iO6zOBIPoNBi7gXI7Wz7I9z0AswGgCo=?refcode=body&amount=25)**

****[Express Donate: $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/elIoYIZLB8CQkVHmIWerMjKYfx1VL4Fzf-6YisCtgds=/C3_WDx5sNhe4iO6zOBIPoNBi7gXI7Wz7I9z0AswGgCo=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=_50-p)****

name: Rita Hart
subject: We can’t let this keep happening
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/hPlox9oYHsohNI2odc-uqTTr8-rULWMcYOSPHSH8fVU=/oQd4hxuus0qxDC0DBzN4e1jT863W6zPSU0K-yxmDScA=?recipientId=s3L820QSpW1Bl8ZP1VBc9&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) When I'm on the road traveling the district, I'm always confronted by a familiar story: families in Iowa struggling with how expensive prescription drugs have become. **Just the other night, a gentleman here in our district told me he traveled all the way to Canada to purchase his insulin because it was a fraction of the cost he pays here in Iowa.** We're all affected by the anxiety and fear created by pharmaceutical industry giants charging exorbitant amounts for medications that people need. It's wrong and we should do better. That's why it makes no sense to me that we don't let Medicare negotiate prescription drug costs for seniors. The VA already does so for our veterans, and a common-sense, practical solution that would make a material change for millions **It 's the right thing to do. It's also the practical thing to do. Why can't Washington just get this done?** [What do you think? Should we give Medicare the power to negotiate prescription drug costs for its members?](https://act.myngp.com/el/hPlox9oYHsohNI2odc-uqTTr8-rULWMcYOSPHSH8fVU=/w2iFDlUQ4X95L1uEYjCsprJwF6ATdbhM-w0G4yO6fjY=?recipientId=s3L820QSpW1Bl8ZP1VBc9&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) | [YES](https://act.myngp.com/el/hPlox9oYHsohNI2odc-uqTTr8-rULWMcYOSPHSH8fVU=/A66cu9ja4mEP2NyX7au23N-m06iETE30zPwAiz7qkq4=?recipientId=s3L820QSpW1Bl8ZP1VBc9&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
---
[NO](https://act.myngp.com/el/hPlox9oYHsohNI2odc-uqTTr8-rULWMcYOSPHSH8fVU=/A66cu9ja4mEP2NyX7au23N-m06iETE30zPwAiz7qkq4=?recipientId=s3L820QSpW1Bl8ZP1VBc9&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
---
The Affordable Care Act was an important step for lots of families - by expanding Medicaid, letting young people stay on their parent's plan, and ending the practice of denying coverage for pre-existing conditions. Now, we have to keep building on the ACA's successes. We should start by bringing down prices and reining in the excesses of Big Pharma.
[I want to know what you think. Should we give Medicare the power to negotiate prescription costs and help ease the burden off millions of American families?](https://act.myngp.com/el/hPlox9oYHsohNI2odc-uqTTr8-rULWMcYOSPHSH8fVU=/w2iFDlUQ4X95L1uEYjCsprJwF6ATdbhM-w0G4yO6fjY=?recipientId=s3L820QSpW1Bl8ZP1VBc9&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
Thank you,
Rita Hart

_**Rita Hart is a lifelong Iowan, farmer, 20-year educator, former State Senator, and candidate for Congress in Iowa 's 2nd Congressional District.**_

[**Can we count on you to contribute a few dollars to Rita 's campaign? >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/hPlox9oYHsohNI2odc-uqTTr8-rULWMcYOSPHSH8fVU=/tmvTEYrMoKavFWoeG776m4Iow48XULpKJgy8G09pDGE=?refcode=191010-email&recurring=auto) | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://act.myngp.com/el/hPlox9oYHsohNI2odc-uqTTr8-rULWMcYOSPHSH8fVU=/tmvTEYrMoKavFWoeG776m4Iow48XULpKJgy8G09pDGE=?refcode=191010-email&recurring=auto)

Wheatland IA 52777 United States

Thank you, Rita Hart Rita Hart is a lifelong Iowan, farmer, 20-year educator, former State Senator, and candidate for Congress in Iowa 's 2nd Congressional District. | Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa Rita Hart for Iowa P.O. Box 333 Wheatland IA 52777 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =.

name: Team Bennet
subject: Michael's plan to tackle the housing affordability crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
Every American should be able to afford a good home in a thriving community | |
---
| Team,

This morning, Michael rolled out an ambitious, three-pronged plan to tackle America's housing affordability crisis and ensure every American can afford a good home in a thriving community.

A home is a platform for stability, good health, upward mobility, and opportunity in America. But for too many families, owning a home is out of reach, and the high cost of paying rent has pushed them to a breaking point.

Michael's plan attacks this crisis from three angles:

* Building more affordable housing near good jobs and good schools by directly supporting the construction, preservation, and refurbishment of nearly 4 million units of affordable housing for middle-class workers, seniors, and low-income families, while creating incentives for communities to build and preserve millions more.
* Making home ownership and renting easier through a combination of fully funding opportunity vouchers for low-income families, creating tax credits that make affording down payments easier, and expanding credit access for smaller mortgages in smaller markets or in high-poverty neighborhoods.
* Reforming the federal tax code so that working families, not the ultra-wealthy, can benefit.

This is a bold, comprehensive plan that will directly address some of the major economic problems facing America today.

But Michael can't do it alone.

We need your help, team. [**Add your name to show that you 're with Michael and agree that America needs to tackle the housing affordability crisis >>**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf20/134673f2/ae5b2e0/6997eb59/1354705127/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiJ9/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/housing-reform-petition?refcode=EM_PET_B1_101019_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=")
---

---
Michael is a purple state senator who has real experience solving problems. This proposal is just the latest of his bold and pragmatic plans that will make America work for all Americans.

While some candidates are writing checks to themselves for millions of dollars to keep their ads on TV, Michael is relying on the support of grassroots donors like you, friend.

If you'd like to read the plan in full detail, click [here.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf20/134673f2/ae5b2e0/6997eb58/1354705127/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://michaelbennet.com/Housing/")

Thanks for your support,
Team Bennet

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Mitch McConnell is openly admitting this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
Our path to taking back the Senate starts right here in Colorado. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714be/691c9bd/6fc99a1f/11a79e36/2253322098/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend,

The news cycle these days could change before you finish reading this email, so I want to make sure you heard about this:

Mitch McConnell was caught promising Republican donors that he would stop any effort to impeach President Trump in the Senate.

That's right. No matter what this investigation turns up,**Mitch McConnell is openly admitting that he 'll refuse to hold the president accountable.**

Look, it's easy to chalk that up to another way D.C. is broken. But the truth is impeachment should _never_ be just another partisan fight--no matter which party holds power. Our founders designed a serious constitutional process that requires good faith from everyone who's taken the oath of office.

But it's clear that Mitch McConnell believes the Senate belongs to him and the Republican Party, not the American people.

**Together we can make sure his majority ends after the next election.** [**_Our path to taking back the Senate starts right here in Colorado --will you chip in to help me bring some overdue change to Washington?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_fr_20191010_JH_20191010-fr-JH-McConnellImpeachment-all_all_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

In the midst of a congressional investigation, my opponent has yet to say anything of substance about the White House scandal. Cory Gardner has spent the past three years taking his cues from Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump. I hope that changes, but I won't be holding my breath.

Regardless of what plays out in this impeachment inquiry, it's crystal clear that we need real leadership from our elected officials in Washington.

That's why I'm running, and that's why we have to win. [**_Chip in to help send me to the Senate and end Mitch McConnell 's stranglehold on our democracy._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_fr_20191010_JH_20191010-fr-JH-McConnellImpeachment-all_all_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

Thank you,

John [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_fr_20191010_JH_20191010-fr-JH-McConnellImpeachment-all_all_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---

P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper for Colorado team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714be/691c9bd/6fc99a1f/11a79e32/2253322098/VEsD/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714be/691c9bd/6fc99a1f/11a79e33/2253322098/VEsA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714be/691c9bd/6fc99a1f/11a79e30/2253322098/VEsB/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714be/691c9bd/6fc99a1f/11a79e31/2253322098/VEsO/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714be/691c9bd/6fc99a1f/11a79e2e/2253322098/VEsP/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you'd like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714be/691c9bd/6fc99a1f/11a79e2f/2253322098/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please update your information [_**here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714be/691c9bd/6fc99a1f/11a79e32/2253322098/VEsHBA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer").

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Demand Kavanaugh's impeachment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, It has been a year since the extraordinarily brave testimony of Dr. Christine Blasey Ford \-- and a year since Mitch McConnell and Susan Collins shut down the FBI investigation into Brett Kavanaugh in order to force a vote and give him a lifetime appointment to the Supreme Court. The accusations against Kavanaugh have not gone away, and now even more have surfaced, showing just how incomplete and limited the FBI investigation was. The Senate didn't do its job in 2018, and now, Senate leadership is once again refusing to reopen the investigation and give survivors the justice they deserve. [**The House of Representatives has the ability to impeach Kavanaugh -- join us in calling on them to do their job and investigate him to the fullest extent possible. We deserve answers, justice, and a Supreme Court that conforms to the highest standards of personal character.**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddea/6e9863e8/1571b09c/1db0fd6f/1809545583/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "http://www.paction.us/impeachkavanaugh/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC") Thank you for standing with us, The WDTO Team [SIGN THE PETITION](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddea/6e9863e8/1571b09c/1db0fd6f/1809545583/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "http://www.paction.us/impeachkavanaugh/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC")

314 Action is a grassroots community of nearly 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.
If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can [click here to make a donation.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4451/4bd7760e/44559c62/77e021a3/3352258330/VEsHAQ/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_footer?refcode=emailfooter&amount=31.41&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=14+-+click+here+to+make+a+donation&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_191010_healthcareprof_U1_X1&source=314_EM_FR_191010_healthcareprof_U1_X1")
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4451/4bd7760e/44559c62/77e021a2/3352258330/VEsHAA/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/less-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=15+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_191010_healthcareprof_U1_X1&source=314_EM_FR_191010_healthcareprof_U1_X1")
If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, [click here.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4451/4bd7760e/44559c62/77e021a1/3352258330/VEsHAw/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=16+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_191010_healthcareprof_U1_X1&source=314_EM_FR_191010_healthcareprof_U1_X1")

[](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d06ae/72412298/41a4b5d9/610307c0/3866726322/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/honestads_act?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_191010_McConnellHonestAds_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_191010_McConnellHonestAds_U1_X1") The new law, called the Honest Ads Act, acknowledges that Russia interfered in the 2016 election -- And will require that social media companies disclose who has paid for advertisements on their sites. **_If the Honest Ads Act passes the Senate, foreign actors won 't be able to blatantly target Americans on Facebook like they did in 2016._** **[But Mitch McConnell has blocked election security legislation time and time again, so we NEED to come together to demand he holds a vote>>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d06ae/72412298/41a4b5d9/610307c3/3866726322/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/honestads_act?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2+-+But+Mitch+McConnell+has+blocked+election&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_191010_McConnellHonestAds_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_191010_McConnellHonestAds_U1_X1")** | | | [Sign on >> ](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d06ae/72412298/41a4b5d9/610307c2/3866726322/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/honestads_act?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+Sign+on+gtgt+&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_191010_McConnellHonestAds_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_191010_McConnellHonestAds_U1_X1")
---
_**Even though senators from across the aisle sponsored this legislation, McConnell won 't support ANYTHING that will endanger Republican chances of holding the Senate, even if it means improving democracy.**_
So we're mobilizing 2,500 engaged supporters to urge Democratic AND Republican senators to pass this legislation which will protect the integrity of our democracy.
**[Can you add your E-Signature to support the Act?>>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d06ae/72412298/41a4b5d9/610307c5/3866726322/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/honestads_act?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4+-+Can+you+add+your+ESignature+to+support+t&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_191010_McConnellHonestAds_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_191010_McConnellHonestAds_U1_X1")**
| | [Join the movement >> ](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d06ae/72412298/41a4b5d9/610307c4/3866726322/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/honestads_act?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=5+-+Join+the+movement+gtgt+&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_191010_McConnellHonestAds_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_191010_McConnellHonestAds_U1_X1")

We can NOT stand for a repeat of the 2016 election.
\-- VPP

If the Honest Ads Act passes the Senate, foreign actors won 't be able to blatantly target Americans on Facebook like they did in 2016. "" | | | "" Even though senators from across the aisle sponsored this legislation, McConnell won 't support ANYTHING that will endanger Republican chances of holding the Senate, even if it means improving democracy. So we're mobilizing 2,500 engaged supporters to urge Democratic AND Republican senators to pass this legislation which will protect the integrity of our democracy. name: Wilmot Collins
subject: Daines joins the executive branch
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
body:
Did you see the latest impeachment update?
Folks,
This is not normal.
_President Trump yesterday REFUSED to comply with Congress ' impeachment inquiry._
[](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164647/1e3760f0/691529f8/5f7ee3c8/2479324431/VEsH/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1910-q4-wc?refcode=191010-email&recurring=auto")
Look -- I know we're in a frightening time -- Trump tried to use taxpayer-funded foreign aid to Ukraine to help ensure his own re-election.
And what has Senator Steve Daines done to address this constitutional crisis? _NOTHING._
As someone who came to this nation as a refugee, who has seen the power of the Constitution in action, this is not something I take lightly -- at all. If you're as frustrated as I am with our Republican Senator's refusal to put our Constitution and Americans above Trump's agenda, _I need you standing with me._
[**Will you rush $5, $25 or even more if you can afford to so we can flip this Senate seat and finally hold Trump 's corruption accountable?**](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164647/1e3760f0/691529f8/5f7ee3c8/2479324431/VEsE/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1910-q4-wc?refcode=191010-email&recurring=auto")
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[$5](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164647/1e3760f0/691529f8/5f7ee3c9/2479324431/VEsF/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1910-q4-wc?refcode=191010-email&recurring=true&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [$20](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164647/1e3760f0/691529f8/5f7ee3c6/2479324431/VEsC/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1910-q4-wc?refcode=191010-email&recurring=true&express_lane=true&amount=20") | [$30](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164647/1e3760f0/691529f8/5f7ee3c7/2479324431/VEsD/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1910-q4-wc?refcode=191010-email&recurring=true&express_lane=true&amount=30")
---|---|---
[$50](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164647/1e3760f0/691529f8/5f7ee3c4/2479324431/VEsA/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1910-q4-wc?refcode=191010-email&recurring=true&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [$100](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164647/1e3760f0/691529f8/5f7ee3c5/2479324431/VEsB/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1910-q4-wc?refcode=191010-email&recurring=true&express_lane=true&amount=100") | [Other](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164647/1e3760f0/691529f8/5f7ee3c2/2479324431/VEsO/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1910-q4-wc?refcode=191010-email&recurring=true&express_lane=true")
Friend, it's far past time for Steve Daines to answer up about his unwavering support of President Trump.
Steve Daines is a member of a co-equal branch of government, but instead he has joined the executive branch.
As Montana's next U.S. Senator I'll always be a check and balance on the executive branch and President Trump.
**But I can 't get there without your grassroots support. I need you with me now more than ever.**
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164647/1e3760f0/691529f8/5f7ee3c8/2479324431/VEsP/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1910-q4-wc?refcode=191010-email&recurring=auto")
Thanks for fighting for our country,

Wilmot

In less than a week, Elizabeth will take the debate stage and make the case for big, structural change to the nation.

And as we move into the last few months of 2019 and into 2020, this is a crucial moment for the campaign -- and we need to keep up the momentum.

This campaign is an opportunity to show the country that you don't need to hold private fundraisers or solicit checks from Washington lobbyists to build a national movement.

It's so important that the campaign is in a strong position before the debate next week. Elizabeth will be fighting for this movement on stage, but she needs to know we're with her.

[**Can Elizabeth count on you to help keep up the momentum before the debate? name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Our children won't have a livable planet if we keep this up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, According to a recent _Washington Post_ survey, almost 60 percent of American teens are scared of climate change and its effects on the planet. They rank it as one of the most important issues facing the country, along with gun policy and healthcare. However, over half of them also said that they are motivated to do something about it, and a quarter of them have already taken concrete actions.
