name: Joe Kennedy III
subject: 11% isn't a majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/m/36391726/55b66746/2c019be9/80cf9d9/1810587739/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | The U.S. Senate was designed to be "the greatest deliberative body in the world"--where democratically elected public servants debated thoughtfully, listened carefully and worked together to respond to the peoples' will. Today, that deliberative body is known for one thing and one thing alone: complete and total obstruction. **It's why we have to get rid of the filibuster.** Let's be clear. The filibuster isn't some wonky, procedural issue. It is a powerful legislative weapon, continuously deployed by those who fear progress, aimed repeatedly at reforms the vast majority of Americans want and need. **During the civil rights era,_segregationists used the filibuster to deny black Americans basic rights and equal justice - again and again and again._ Today, science deniers in the Senate have blocked any action to address climate change, NRA-hugging Republicans have stopped any effort to reduce gun violence, and anti-equality leaders have consistently stood in the way of the basic legal protections LGBTQIA+ Americans deserve.** **Thanks to Mitch McConnell's abuse of the filibuster, not only will we not take on these critical issues, but _the Senate won't even discuss them._ Instead**, our government stands by as our kids learn active shooter drills in school, climate change wreaks havoc on our home, and millions of Americans are discriminated against in their daily lives. In a democracy, the public is supposed to get a government that acts in a way the majority of the country supports. **Under the filibuster, just 41 Senators, who could represent as few as 11.1% of Americans, can block anything - or everything - the other 89% supports.** It's no wonder that so many people today feel overlooked, cut off or outright ignored by our system. **The system isn't speaking for them.** It's time we change that. And that's what this campaign is all about. Onward, Joe Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/m/36391726/55b66746/2c019be9/80cf9da/1810587739/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2019-10-10-filibuster&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/m/36391726/55b66746/2c019be9/80cf9db/1810587739/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2019-10-10-filibuster&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/m/36391726/55b66746/2c019be9/80cf9e4/1810587739/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2019-10-10-filibuster&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/m/36391726/55b66746/2c019be9/80cf9e5/1810587739/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2019-10-10-filibuster&refcode2=express-buttons")

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Video of the day: What a REAL border wall looks like!
body:
When President Donald J. Trump promised to build the wall, many Americans didn’t realize the terrible shape our border security infrastructure was... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1069ad34f0&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • October 10, 2019
---
| | |
# **Video of the day: What a REAL border wall looks like!**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=543aae4531&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **When President Donald J. Trump** promised to build the wall, many Americans didn’t realize the terrible shape our border security infrastructure was in. Politicians from both parties had ignored our southern border for years, failing to give our law enforcement officers the tools they needed to do their jobs safely and effectively.

**The old barriers** along our southern border were built to defend against vehicle crossings—and not much else. Over the years, many miles had fallen into disrepair.

**Under this President** , comprehensive technology—including a real barrier that stops _all_ forms of smuggling—will keep America’s borders safe, strong, and secure!

[Watch: The men and women of ICE are American patriots.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5359b0e1f4&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **In photos: Vice President Pence tells Congressional Democrats to put U.S. workers before politics**

**“Over one year ago,** President Trump negotiated the largest trade deal in American history: the United States–Mexico–Canada Agreement,” Vice President Mike Pence told a crowd of Iowans yesterday. “I was there all along the way for a lot of the negotiations, and I’ll tell you what: The President drove a hard bargain.”

**Iowa is America’s** second-largest agricultural exporting state, producing more than $10.3 billion in these goods each year. When Congress finally passes USMCA, these numbers will get even bigger, expanding opportunity for workers in America’s heartland.

**So what’s the holdup?** As usual, it comes down to one group. More specifically, it comes down to one person: House Speaker Nancy Pelosi. Her refusal to bring this trade deal to the House floor for a vote boils down to nothing more than petty, partisan politics.

**“The truth is** —and we all know it—Democrats have been spending all their time on endless investigations and a partisan impeachment,” the Vice President said.

“**But enough is enough**. The American people deserve better.”

**USMCA replaces and updates NAFTA,** accomplishing many goals that Democrats claimed to support for years. It gives American workers a better deal, strengthening labor provisions with Mexico and Canada from the voluntary terms that NAFTA set. It also does a much better job protecting our environment than the outdated deal it replaces.

**Congressional Democrats** have had a problem keeping their promises to voters. First, they said they would secure our borders better than President Trump could. They didn’t. Then they said they would level the playing field for American workers by addressing NAFTA’s flaws that put corporate profits over people. They haven’t.

**“I’ll make you a promise,”** Vice President Pence said. “Whatever the Democrats in Congress choose to spend their time on, President Trump and I are never going to stop fighting for you and the agenda that Iowa voted for in 2016. Count on it.”

[In photos: Vice President Pence fights for USMCA in Iowa.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=78d828e144&e=3ee4985eea)

**Grassley and Brady:** [“It's time for Congress to pass the U.S.-Mexico-Canada Agreement”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b2bb6b7edf&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks
| **First Lady Melania Trump participates in a listening session on the impact of youth vaping with teens from the Truth Initiative in the Blue Room of the White House** | October 9, 2019
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0072a43741&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=be562a4490&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=5bd4cfe352)
---

name: Kristen Foca
subject: Numbers don't lie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
body:
Team Schmid has reached six figures in less than one month, thanks to you.
|
---

| | Friends, Looks like we're getting noticed, and this is only the beginning! Your dedication and grassroots support means everything to us, and we can't stop now. We all know the high stakes of this race -- and with Rep. Chris Smith as the last Republican in his delegation in all of New Jersey, we have a chance to not just flip the 4th District but flip the Garden State **_BLUE_**. _[**Can you chip in to keep up the momentum and make sure we come out on top?**](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0b7/522d4087/7afd8c6c/4f342f32/972212695/VEsH/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-october?refcode=20191010_em&utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=1+-+Can+you+chip+in+to+keep+up+the+momentum+&utm_campaign=20191010_em&source=20191010_em")_ _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | **[Chip in $25 now](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0b7/522d4087/7afd8c6c/4f342f31/972212695/VEsE/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-october?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=20191010_em_abx_25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=2+-+Chip+in+25+now&utm_campaign=20191010_em&source=20191010_em")**
---
**[Chip in $50 now](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0b7/522d4087/7afd8c6c/4f342f30/972212695/VEsF/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-october?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20191010_em_abx_50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=3+-+Chip+in+50+now&utm_campaign=20191010_em&source=20191010_em")**
---
**[Chip in $75 now](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0b7/522d4087/7afd8c6c/4f342f2f/972212695/VEsC/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-october?express_lane=true&amount=75&refcode=20191010_em_abx_75&utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=4+-+Chip+in+75+now&utm_campaign=20191010_em&source=20191010_em")**
---
**[Donate another amount now](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0b7/522d4087/7afd8c6c/4f342f2e/972212695/VEsD/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-october?refcode=20191010_em_abx_other&utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=5+-+Donate+another+amount+now&utm_campaign=20191010_em&source=20191010_em")**
---
Last year Rep. Smith defeated the Democratic challenger 55 to 43%. That's a 10-point improvement from 2016. And here's the thing, : _**numbers don 't lie**_.
The 2018 campaign showed that people are ready for change in the 4th District, and ready for a trusted leader who will fight for reproductive rights, human rights, affordable healthcare, and will protect our diplomacy. **And Stephanie 's the candidate to do that.**
Stephanie has a strong record of serving her community and is ready to serve the people in this district.
But she can't do this alone, and she's ready for us to take down Rep. Smith together. _[**Can I count on you to pitch in to keep the momentum going?**](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0b7/522d4087/7afd8c6c/4f342f2d/972212695/VEsA/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-october?refcode=20191010_em&utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=6+-+Can+I+count+on+you+to+pitch+in+to+keep+t&utm_campaign=20191010_em&source=20191010_em")_
Thanks for everything,
Kristen Foca
Deputy Campaign Manager
Stephanie Schmid for Congress
|
---

| | **Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
---
_New Jersey native Stephanie Schmid is running for New Jersey 's 4th Congressional District. Stephanie has a strong record of serving her community, protecting those most vulnerable, and solving difficult public policy problems. She's running to bring new leadership to Congress at a time when we need our leaders to solve pressing challenges and create opportunities for the people of New Jersey._ _Stephanie is running a grassroots campaign rooted in New Jersey values. She's not accepting any corporate PAC donations or money from special interests.[**Can you chip in $5 now to Stephanie's campaign?**](secure.actblue.com/donate/founding-donor-nj-04?refcode=em_footer&amounts=5,10,15,20,25,30,35&amount=5)_

Stephanie for New Jersey
P.O. Box 217
Little Silver, NJ 07739
_Emails like this help us stay in touch with you over the course of the campaign. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. You may click here to[unsubscribe](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0b7/522d4087/7afd8c6c/4f342f2c/972212695/VEsB/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://stephanie.bsd.net/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=7+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=20191010_em&source=20191010_em") at any time._

subject: I need your input here.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PERDUE FOR SENATE
body:
What's your top priority?

https://secure.winred.com/david-perdue/2019october-issue-survey?utm_source=rc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2019oct10prospects

**
------------------------------------------------------------
Peter,

Since coming to the U.S. Senate as an outsider, I’ve been fighting to change Washington from the inside out. However, I can’t do this without YOU.

I’m emailing about an important opportunity to let me know what you think we should be focused on. We’ve just finalized our OFFICIAL October Priorities Survey. Will you take it right now and let me know what matters most to you? (https://secure.winred.com/david-perdue/2019october-issue-survey?utm_source=rc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2019oct10prospects)
TAKE THE SURVEY (https://secure.winred.com/david-perdue/2019october-issue-survey?utm_source=rc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2019oct10prospects)
Peter, input from grassroots supporters like you is more critical than ever before!

Radical Democrats are openly embracing socialist policies. Liberal donors are planning to spend hundreds of millions in Georgia and around the country to end our Republican Senate majority. The national liberal media is giving these Democrats constant attention.

We have to cut through the noise to deliver results, but that means we have to focus on what matters. That’s why I want to hear from YOU.

Will you be one of the first to take our official October Priorities Survey RIGHT NOW? (https://secure.winred.com/david-perdue/2019october-issue-survey?utm_source=rc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2019oct10prospects)

Thank you for your continued input and support.

David
OCTOBER PRIORITIES SURVEY (https://secure.winred.com/david-perdue/2019october-issue-survey?utm_source=rc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2019oct10prospects)

============================================================
PAID FOR BY PERDUE FOR SENATE
** (https://secure.winred.com/david-perdue/2019october-issue-survey?utm_source=rc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2019oct10prospects)
We know we send a lot of emails, but the truth is: We're counting on you. David is an outsider, not a career politician. He got elected because of supporters like you. He's counting on your help to continue delivering results. These emails are critical to keeping you updated on ways you can help David make a difference. Thank you for all that you do!
PO Box 12077, Atlanta, GA 30355
** Privacy Policy (https://perduesenate.com/privacy-policy)

Want to change how you receive these emails? We would hate to see you go - these emails are critical to our campaign - but you can ** update your preferences (https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=a4d292c925&e=02cd889ad3)
or ** unsubscribe from this list (https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=a4d292c925&e=02cd889ad3&c=13b8826a92)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:

| Here's what you need to know: 1) With Congressman Joe Kennedy III in the race, Ed now has THREE opponents. 2) Early fundraising will be crucial to winning this race. 3) We're coming up short on this week's fundraising goal, and we need another 780 supporters to pitch in $27 or more before midnight.

_**[Will you become a 2019 member of Ed's campaign by pitching in right away?](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-2019-membership?refcode=EM-101019_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

Begin forward:

And with Congressman Joe Kennedy III in the race, we don't have just one primary opponent; **we now have THREE.**

That's why Ed's not taking anything for granted, and we're working hard to get his message out to voters.

The funds we raise now will make a huge impact on our campaign come Primary Day. But if we fall short of these early goals, we could see ourselves falling short of victory.

name: Team Yang
subject: We need 800 people in Pennsylvania to step up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Become a part of something historic.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=1490%2E377263%2EGOKVdQ) Yang Gang --

We’re at a pivotal moment in this campaign.

We need to go in to next week’s debate in a strong place and send the message that we are a top contender for the nomination. That’s why we’ve set a new public goal for this team -- 40,000 contributions by the time Andrew steps on the stage for the debate in Ohio on October 15th.

This goal is extremely difficult, and not many campaigns would try it, but we know the power of the Yang Gang and we’re counting on you to be the difference.

**We need you to be one of 800 people in Pennsylvania that steps up and makes a contribution of $5 or more to our campaign today. Please pitch in now:** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/13077?t=5&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=1490%2E377263%2EGOKVdQ)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/13077?t=12&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=1490%2E377263%2EGOKVdQ)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/13077?t=11&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=1490%2E377263%2EGOKVdQ)
---
| | [$100»](https://act.yang2020.com/go/13077?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=1490%2E377263%2EGOKVdQ)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/13077?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=1490%2E377263%2EGOKVdQ)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/13077?t=8&amount=25&akid=1490%2E377263%2EGOKVdQ)
---
Together, we are building a campaign that is breaking the mold at every turn. It’s why we’re making this goal public and showing the world whether we hit it -- or fall short.

**This is our chance to vault Andrew into the top tier. Help us hit one of our most ambitious goals yet. Rush a contribution today:** [https://act.yang2020.com/go/40kGoal](https://act.yang2020.com/go/13077?t=7)

Let’s do this,

Team Yang
**Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us keep building this movement.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/13077?t=6&akid=1490%2E377263%2EGOKVdQ)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=1490%2E377263%2EGOKVdQ) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=1490%2E377263%2EGOKVdQ) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
